description: Governed AI operations foundation. GitHub is the single shared source of project-task truth; every task is a machine-readable contract with explicit scope, branch authority, bounded repair, and owner-gated merge/deploy. Enforcement in V1 is ADVISORY. No autonomous merge, no autonomous production deployment.
principles: GitHub is the single shared source of project-task truth
every task is a structured, data-only contract (no embedded shell commands)
master = production/site/code/architecture/governance authority; main = default-branch control plane
master and main are never merged wholesale in either direction
Claude Code is the only executor; ChatGPT is architect/reviewer; the owner holds every merge/deploy gate
scope and authorization are validated deterministically and locally before and during PR review
repair is bounded to two attempts inside the original scope and never touches prohibited categories
no state transition infers merge or deploy authorization

prAdvisoryGate.notes: does not deploy, does not write repository contents, never uses pull_request_target, never a required check in this task

controlPlane.note: these live on main because Issue Forms, PR templates and workflow_dispatch control workflows only become active on the repository default branch

prohibited: invoking external AI provider APIs from CI
